tools.description: Get aggregated evaluation scores per trace within a time range.

limit.description: Optional. Max trace scores to return (default 100, min 1, max 100).

tools.name: agent_trace_scores

tools.description: Trigger a build for an existing internal agent.

commit_id.description: Optional. Commit ID to build. Defaults to latest.

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent exists.

tools.name: build_agent

tools.description: Create a custom evaluator (code or llm_judge).

required.description: Optional. Whether this field is required.

type.description: Required. Value type (string, integer, float, boolean, array, enum).

source.description: Required. Source code or prompt template.

tags.description: Optional. Tags for search and grouping.

tools.name: create_custom_evaluator

tools.description: Register an agent as externally-hosted and return setup steps for enabling instrumentation. This will allow getting observalibity and evaluation for the agents

description.description: Optional. Short description about what the agent does.

display_name.description: Required. Human-readable display name for the agent.

language.description: Required. Agent language for setup guide (python or ballerina).

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent will be registered.

tools.name: create_external_agent

tools.description: Register an agent as platform-hosted (internal) Docker agent. This will trigger an initial build automatically and return the created agent details.

base_path.description: Optional. API base path (default: /). Required when interface_type is CUSTOM.

description.description: Optional. Short description about what the agent does.

display_name.description: Required. Human-readable display name for the agent.

dockerfile_path.description: Optional. Path to Dockerfile in repo (default: /Dockerfile).

enable_auto_instrumentation.description: Optional. Enable OTEL auto instrumentation for observability.

interface_type.description: Optional. DEFAULT (chat API on /chat, port 8000) or CUSTOM (user-provided OpenAPI). Default: DEFAULT.

openapi_path.description: Required when interface_type is CUSTOM. OpenAPI spec file path within the repo (must start with /).

port.description: Required when interface_type is CUSTOM. Port number where the agent listens.

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent will be created.

tools.name: create_internal_agent_docker

tools.description: Register an agent as a platform-hosted (internal) Python buildpack agent. This will trigger an initial build automatically and return the created agent details.

app_path.description: Optional. Path of the project where agent code lives within the repository (default: /).

base_path.description: Optional. API base path (default: /). Required when interface_type is CUSTOM.

branch.description: Optional. Github repository branch name (default: main).

description.description: Optional Short description about what the agent does.

display_name.description: Required. Human-readable display name for the agent.

enable_auto_instrumentation.description: Automatically enables OTEL tracing instrumentation to your agent for observability.

env.description: Optional. Environment variables and other configurations for the agent (from the .env file in the project repository).

interface_type.description: Optional. API interface type of the agent. DEFAULT (standard chat interface with /chat endpoint on port 8000) or CUSTOM (custom API with user-provided OpenAPI spec). Default: DEFAULT.

openapi_path.description: Required when interface_type is CUSTOM. OpenAPI specification file path within the repository (must start with /).

port.description: Required when interface_type is CUSTOM. Port number where the agent will be listening.

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent will be created.

repository_url.description: Required. GitHub root repository URL. Do not enter .git and the end of repo name(eg: https://github.com/user/repo)

run_command.description: Optional. Start command to run the agent (default: python main.py).

tools.name: create_internal_agent_python

tools.description: Create a new evaluation monitor (future or past).

evaluators.description: Required. List of evaluators with optional configuration.

display_name.description: Required. Display name unique within the monitor.

interval_minutes.description: Optional. Interval in minutes for future monitors.

llm_provider_configs.description: Optional. LLM provider credentials for LLM-judge evaluators.

env_var.description: Required. Env var name expected by the provider.

provider_name.description: Required. LLM provider name (from evaluator LLM providers list).

trace_end.description: Optional. RFC3339 end time for past monitors.

trace_start.description: Optional. RFC3339 start time for past monitors.

tools.name: create_monitor

tools.description: Deploy an existing internal agent. (Deployed to the lowest environment in the deployment pipeline.)

enable_auto_instrumentation.description: Optional. Enable auto instrumentation for observability.

is_sensitive.description: Optional. If true, value is stored as a secret.

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent exists.

tools.name: deploy_agent

tools.description: Filter traces by a specific condition for a time window. Returns full traces (traces + spans) that match the condition.

condition.description: Required. One of: error_status, length_compliance_violation, high_latency, high_token_usage, tool_call_fails, excessive_steps.

end_time.description: Optional. RFC3339 end time (UTC). Defaults to now.

limit.description: Optional. Max number of traces to return after filtering.

max_latency_ms.description: Optional. Max latency in milliseconds for high_latency. Defaults to 30000.

max_length.description: Optional. Max output length for length_compliance_violation. Defaults to 10000.

max_span_count.description: Optional. Max span count for excessive_steps. Defaults to 40.

max_tokens.description: Optional. Max tokens for high_token_usage. Defaults to 10000.

min_length.description: Optional. Min output length for length_compliance_violation. Defaults to 1.

start_time.description: Optional. RFC3339 start time (UTC). Defaults to last 24h.

tools.name: filter_traces

tools.description: Fetch build logs for a specific build of an internal agent.

agent_name.description: Required. Agent name that owns the build.

build_name.description: Required. Build name to fetch logs for.

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent exists.

tools.name: get_build_logs

tools.description: Return the Agent Manager documentation sitemap URL. use when further details about the agent manager platform or its capabilities are needed.
tools.name: get_docs_sitemap

tools.description: Get more details about a specific evaluator.
tools.name: get_evaluator

tools.description: Get details for a specific monitor.
tools.name: get_monitor

tools.description: Get execution logs for a specific monitor run.
tools.name: get_monitor_run_logs

tools.description: Fetch runtime logs for an agent. Facilitate time range, log level, or search filtering if needed.

agent_name.description: Required. Agent name to fetch runtime logs for.

end_time.description: Optional. RFC3339 end time (UTC). Defaults to now if omitted.

limit.description: Optional. Max number of log entries (1-10000).

log_levels.description: Optional. Filter by log levels (DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR).

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent exists.

search_phrase.description: Optional. Search phrase to filter logs by content.

sort_order.description: Optional. Sort order: asc or desc.

start_time.description: Optional. RFC3339 start time (UTC). Defaults to last 24h if omitted.

tools.name: get_runtime_logs

tools.description: Fetch a single trace by trace_id for a specific agent. Returns full trace details and spans.
tools.name: get_trace_details

tools.description: List recent traces for an agent in a time window  with span details (detailed view)

agent_name.description: Required. Agent name to export traces for.

end_time.description: Optional. RFC3339 end time (UTC). Defaults to now.

limit.description: Optional. Max number of traces to return (1-1000).

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent exists.

sort_order.description: Optional. Sort order: desc (newest first) or asc.

start_time.description: Optional. RFC3339 start time (UTC). Defaults to last 24h.

tools.name: get_traces

tools.description: List agents within a specific project.

limit.description: Optional. Max agents to return (default 10, min 1, max 50).

project_name.description: Required. Project name to list agents from.

tools.name: list_agents

tools.description: List current builds for a specific agent.

agent_name.description: Required. Agent name to list builds for.

limit.description: Optional. Max builds to return (default 10, min 1, max 50).

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent exists.

tools.description: List current deployments for an agent per environment.

agent_name.description: Required. Agent name to check deployments for.

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent exists.

tools.description: List supported LLM providers for evaluator jobs (credentials and available models).
tools.name: list_evaluator_llm_providers

tools.description: List available evaluators (both built-in and custom) for an organization.

limit.description: Optional. Max evaluators to return (default 10, min 1, max 50).

search.description: Optional. Filter evaluators by a search term.

source.description: Optional. Filter by source: all, builtin, custom.

tools.name: list_evaluators

tools.description: List execution runs for a monitor.

include_scores.description: Optional. Include evaluator score summaries per run.

limit.description: Optional. Max runs to return (default 20, min 1, max 100).

tools.description: List all evaluation monitors for an agent.

tools.description: List all projects registered within an organization.

limit.description: Optional. Max projects to return (default 10, min 1, max 50).

tools.description: List (project, agent) pairs registered within an organization.

agent_search.description: Optional. Filter agent names by substring (case-insensitive).

project_search.description: Optional. Filter project names by substring (case-insensitive).

tools.name: list_project_agent_pairs

tools.description: List recent traces for an agent in a time window (summary view).

agent_name.description: Required. Agent name to check traces for.

end_time.description: Optional. RFC3339 end time (UTC). Defaults to now.

include_io.description: Optional. Include input/output fields in the trace list.

limit.description: Optional. Max number of traces to return (1-100).

project_name.description: Required. Project name where the agent exists.

sort_order.description: Optional. Sort order: desc (newest first) or asc.

start_time.description: Optional. RFC3339 start time (UTC). Defaults to last 24h.

source.description: Optional. Updated source code or prompt template.

env_var.description: Required. Env var name expected by the provider.

provider_name.description: Required. LLM provider name (from evaluator LLM providers list).
